productDisplayName: Nike Men Lunarfly +3 Black Sports Shoes
description: The nike LunarFly +3 Sports shoe is designed for those who love to run. These shoes are ultra light, and are ideal for walking and running. These authentic nike shoes are durable and perfect for fitness enthusiasts to use indoors at the sports club and outdoors.UpperLeather and mesh upper for lightweight breathabilityLushly padded tongue and collar for snug FitCentral lacing for customised comfortable fitMesh tongue with textile lined collar for comfortMidsoleLunarlon technology employed with foam core bonded to a phylon carrier for enhanced cushioning and increased energy returnDynamic support layers along the foam core to produce a denser medial midsole to reduce overpronationOutsoleBRS 1000 carbon rubber on the heel counter for added durabilityEPR forefoot for multi-surface tractionWaffle outsole design on forefoot for multi-surface traction and cushioningShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
